name: surface
description: Ad-hoc structured input from one or more recipients via flexible, distributable interfaces. Generates ephemeral UI surfaces with opaque-ID affordances, delivers URLs through any outbound channel, and autonomously drains submissions to react. Also covers runbook delivery: a list of shell commands the user works through one at a time, with per-step copy affordances and done buttons. Especially strong for information-dense pages where rich context (tables, grids, flagged data, narratives) appears alongside multiple granularities of structured input.
